rationale: The response initially warns against adding a third fallback and points toward root-cause investigation, so there is a partial wakeup. However, it then explicitly specifies conditions and test coverage for a third fallback and concludes that it can be added as an explicit degradation branch. That observes the fail signal: designing the third fallback instead of treating the layering impulse as a red state where only change/delete and root-cause work are allowed.
